_comment: Bundled fallback copy — canonical source is ~/saito.run/lexicons/run/saito/fact.json. Keep these in sync; the canonical one owns the NSID authority, this one just means saito-fact-lexicon.mjs works standalone if that sibling repo isn't checked out.
description: A single subject-predicate-object fact recorded by a SAITO-pattern agent (Thompson-sampling bandit + fact store) -- a discourse-graph classification, a proposed connection, a sensor's last reading, etc. Direct wire-format mapping of the FactStore shape used by sail-judge.mjs (haiku.garden, production) and station-4-bots' bandit.mjs/fact-store.mjs (iosp-hacking-stations, workshop) -- the point of this lexicon is that both, and any future implementation in any language, read/write the same records instead of forking each other's code. Moved here 2026-07-18 from computer.atmospheric.saito.fact (atmospheric.computer's authority) once saito.run was registered as SAITO's own project handle/authority -- the wire format is unchanged, only the NSID's authority moved.

subject.description: What/who this fact is about. Free text for now (e.g. a Bluesky post's raw text) -- not yet a strongRef. Revisit once facts commonly point at other real ATProto records instead of describing them in prose.

predicate.description: The relation, e.g. 'classified-as', 'evidence-for', 'supports', 'addresses', 'relates-to'. Deliberately open, not an enum -- matches the fact store's own substrate-agnostic design.

object.description: The other side of the relation -- same free-text-for-now caveat as subject.

confidence.description: Confidence as a 0-100 integer (percentage). AT Protocol records have no float type, so a 0.0-1.0 float at the application layer becomes Math.round(confidence * 100) on write, and value/100.0 on read.

disputed.description: Flipped true if a human later rejects this fact. Requires an update (putRecord) to the same rkey, not a new record.

sourceEvent.description: What triggered this fact -- e.g. the post text or seed paper title that led to it.
